triples.subject: Polestar Automotive Holding UK PLC
triples.object: preliminary unaudited financial and operational results for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2023
triples.sentence: Polestar Automotive Holding UK PLC (“Polestar” or the “Company,” Nasdaq: PSNY), the Swedish electric performance car brand, reports its preliminary unaudited financial and operational results for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2023.

triples.subject: Revenue

triples.subject: Polestar 3 vehicle model
triples.sentence: The new Polestar 3 vehicle model launched in late 2022, and production is expected to begin in early 2024 and ramp-up during the same year.
